biological_replicate: human cells with a human- and a bird-adapted IAV strain
experimental_design: comparing a low-pathogenic avian H3N2 IAV to a seasonal human IAV isolate
factor_value: avian H3N2 IAV (A/Mallard/439/2004—Mal) to a seasonal human IAV isolate (A/Panama/2007/1999—Pan)
number_of_biological_replicates: 6029 proteins in at least two biological replicates
